summary: Focana makes the return-to-work flow feel tighter in 1.5.1, with a cleaner resume prompt and a faster way to close out saved work before moving on.
improvements: Resume prompts now use a tighter layout in both full and compact windows, with copy and spacing that keep the key actions visible more consistently.
The re-entry chooser now labels the active task more clearly so it is easier to confirm what you are picking back up.
fixes: If you choose Start Something New from a resumable prompt, you can now mark the saved task complete with recap and next steps instead of being forced to keep it open.
Resume and save-for-later surfaces now size more reliably so notes fields and controls are less likely to feel cramped.
